# Mirai Society

> A youth-led NGO building a national education movement — starting from Uttarakhand and growing across India through direct field work with children, families, and schools.

Mirai Society is a registered nonprofit founded by teachers and young professionals. We work directly with children, parents, schools, and communities to keep children connected to education through practical, community-rooted support.

## What we do

- **Learning Support**: School supplies, learning materials, and on-ground encouragement for children
- **Family and Community Outreach**: Engaging parents, teachers, and communities in educational continuity
- **Confidence and Child Development**: Group activities and child-centered support to build confidence and future awareness
- **Mirai Learning Center**: Partnering with schools to teach children who cannot attend regularly, so they can still sit exams at their school

## Key facts

- 250+ children reached through direct field work
- 18 field activities completed (Jan–Mar 2026)
- Daily on-ground engagement in Uttarakhand
- Founded 2025 | Registered nonprofit | India

## How to support

- Donate books, stationery, and school materials
- Volunteer as a teacher, mentor, or outreach supporter
- Register your school for the Mirai Learning Center program
- Financial support via bank transfer (contact for details)

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.miraisociety.org/) — Who we are, mission, programs, impact stories
- [Our Mission](https://www.miraisociety.org/mission.html) — Mirai Learning Center, school registration
- [Donate / Support](https://www.miraisociety.org/donate.html) — Ways to give, current needs
- [Volunteer / Join Us](https://www.miraisociety.org/volunteer.html) — Volunteer roles and expression of interest
- [Our Team](https://www.miraisociety.org/team.html) — Leadership, management, and field volunteers
- [Field Updates](https://www.miraisociety.org/updates.html) — On-ground activities and milestones
- [Media](https://www.miraisociety.org/media.html) — Photos and videos from the field
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.miraisociety.org/privacy.html)
